channel.title: About on Matthew J Harmon .com
channel.description: Recent content in About on Matthew J Harmon .com

item.title: About
item.description: About Me As a technologist since the 90’s, I still enjoy building resilient infrastructure and teaching the next generation about technology. I teach offensive and defensive cyber security, as well as UNIX, including Linux, FreeBSD, OpenBSD, and HardenedBSD. Additionally, from time to time I publish about cyber security, give interviews to local news stations, and present my research in public forums. Early on in my career I was active as an international standards developer, functioning as a liaison from ANSI to ISO and the ITU.

item.title: Contact
